chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1752 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8518/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.8519/2021 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 22-12-2021 Petitioner Mian Muhammad Nouman Naeem, present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Through this Petition, the Petitioner seeks directions for removal of encroachment apparently on some public property. The appropriate remedy lies before the Anti-Encroachment Tribunal; hence, the Petition is misconceived. The same is dismissed with pending application; whereas, the Petitioner may approach the Tribunal. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
